records.snippet_en: been revised since the publication of United’s Form 10-K to incorporate additional SAF volumes for which supporting documentation was received after the initial filing. 1 United accounts emissions reductions associated with the use and combustion of sustainable aviation fuel (SAF) to be a Scope 1 reduction, as it is in-sector and a sustainable alternative to the conventional jet fuel usage that is accounted in the gross emissions of this Scope. Our emissions, energy, water and waste.
